title: Business Development * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Business Development * Native American Community 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LIVELIHOOD NW OPEN BUSINESS ADVISING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for people to access information and resources about running a business, including planning and strategy development, market research, human resources support, financial analysis, loan packaging, and specialized information and referral. It also offers a course focused specifically on assistance with accounting and bookkeeping systems. PO Box 13775 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on individuals who identify as female, BIPOC, or LGBTQ2+ Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 988-8255 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER MICRO ENTERPRISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides technical assistance, training in business skills, assistance writing business plans, access to financial business counseling, individual development accounts (IDAs), and other support for individuals who want to establish a small business. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Individuals who self-identify as tribal members Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 288-8177 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST NATIVE CHAMBER CULTURALLY SPECIFIC COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information, networking opportunities, mentoring, and technical assistance for businesses. 6500 S Macadam Avenue Suite 175 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Native American community Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 894-4525 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST NATIVE CHAMBER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information, networking opportunities, mentoring, and technical assistance for businesses in areas of financial management, legal support, marketing, and more. Also offers a scholarship fund for American Indian and Alaskan Native students entering college. 6500 S Macadam Avenue Suite 175 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Business owners, entrepreneurs, and students within the Native American Indian and Alaskan Native communities Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 894-4525 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM SMALL BUSINESS SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides business education and one-on-one counseling and coaching. Topics may include; marketing, setting financial goals, developing business plans using Idea Buddy, business registration, learning about loan opportunities, including Kiva loans. 1136 Paiute Avenue Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: People who live, work, or have addresses on the Warm Springs Indian Reservation Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 553-1348 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVELIHOOD NW OPEN BUSINESS ADVISING NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER MICRO ENTERPRISE NORTHWEST NATIVE CHAMBER CULTURALLY SPECIFIC COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM SMALL BUSINESS SUPPORT
